sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6464" key="a)na/doma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνάδομα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n6464.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">product of digestion,</tr_> cj. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.384a</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
